primitiveContainsCompactCoreStatus.label: primitive image contains compact smooth core
primitiveContainsCompactCoreStatus.reason: Compact smooth Volterra core elements arise as derivatives of compact primitive tests.

primitiveTraceDenseStatus.label: primitive trace image is dense in X_R
primitiveTraceDenseStatus.reason: The primitive trace image is dense in the completed transported trace range.

dqZeroEquivalenceStatus.label: D_q zero transfers from X_R to primitive image
dqZeroEquivalenceStatus.reason: Since D_q is bounded, D_q=0 on X_R is equivalent to D_q=0 on the dense primitive trace image.

proof: Import the primitive trace image density theorem.
Expose only the density and bounded-form transfer needed by endpoint compatibility.
